behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key paths (prompt-input.tsx, settings-general.tsx, e2e specs), data-action strings ('prompt-permissions', 'settings-auto-accept-permissions'), and identifiers (acceptLabel, toggleAccept, usePermission via 'permission context', Switch, SettingsRow).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to move and required attributes/behavior but doesn't provide code or line-level edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for required data-action strings, Switch usage, usePermission import/call, and either toggleAutoAccept or enable/disableAutoAccept pair — allowing reasonable implementation variants.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse TS AST via node, run bun typecheck and bun test for unit/e2e suites, not just string matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests require real AST changes (removal of data-action, addition of Switch with checked/onChange, usePermission call, directory/session handlers) that a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Removal from prompt-input, addition to settings with correct data-action and permission context usage, and e2e updates all covered.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass repo_tests) with descriptive docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Task inherently requires naming the files being refactored; no line-number leakage.
